form.title: Send Invitation
form.message_placeholder: Add a personal note to the invitation...

info_panel.title: How Invitations Work
roles: Member — can participate in elections and view org content.
Admin — can manage members, elections, and settings.
Commission — election committee role for scrutineers.
process: They receive an email with a sign-up link.
Once they register, they become an active member.
info_panel.note: The invitation expires after 7 days. You can resend or cancel it from the pending list below.
